title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies:
HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance Digital Technologies!
